sentences.english: I have three tattoos and I love all of them.
sentences.korean: 문신이 세 개 있고 다 좋아해요.

sentences.english: Each one has a special meaning to me.
I would never get a tattoo, because I know I'd regret it later.
sentences.korean: 절대 문신을 안 할 거예요. 나중에 후회할 걸 아니까요.

sentences.english: I want to get a small one on my wrist but I'm afraid of the pain.
sentences.korean: 손목에 작은 걸 하고 싶지만 아픔이 두려워요.

sentences.english: My friend said it felt like a cat scratching you over and over.
sentences.korean: 친구가 고양이가 반복해서 할퀴는 느낌이라고 했어요.
